name: Milky Way Cake (Plain Jane)
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt candy bars and 1/2 cup butter in a saucepan over very low heat. Set aside.
2. Preheat oven to 350°F.
3. Beat sugar and remaining butter until fluffy. Add eggs, one at a time, beating well after each addition.
4. Add flour and baking soda alternately with buttermilk, stirring until smooth. Add candy mixture, stirring well. Stir in vanilla and nuts (nuts are optional).
5. Pour batter into greased, floured bundt pan.
6. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour and 15 to 25 minutes. Test with a toothpick.
7. Cool in pan on wire rack for 20 minutes, then remove from pan.
Servings: 8
Fat grams per serving: Approx.
Cholesterol per serving: Marks:
Cook Time: Approximately 1:20
